---
title: "movie-survey"
---

```{r}
library(reticulate)

py_install("cinemagoer", pip = TRUE)
```

```{r}
py_run_string("
import imdb
ia = imdb.Cinemagoer()
print('worked')
")
```

```{python}
import csv
import imdb

ia = imdb.Cinemagoer()

output_file = "/Users/randi/Desktop/2026/movie-survey/movies.csv"

movies = [["title", "year", "genres"]]

for genre in ["drama":
    results = ia.get_keyword(genre, results=100)

    for movie in results:
        title = movie.get("title")
        year = movie.get("year")
        genres = movie.get("genres", [])

        if year and year >= 2020:
            movies.append([title, year, ", ".join(genres)])

with open(output_file, "w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as file:
    writer = csv.writer(file)
    writer.writerows(movies)
```
